mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.id) FROM MEMBER m JOIN `USER` u ON m.user_id = u.id JOIN MEMBERSHIP_PT mp ON mp.member_id = m.id WHERE mp.gym_id = #{gymId} AND u.created_at >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01')

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(l.start_time, '%H:%i') AS startTime, tu.name AS trainerName, mu.name AS memberName, CASE WHEN mp.id IS NULL THEN 'PT 예약회원' ELSE CONCAT('PT ', m.type_rep, '회권') END AS membershipName, l.status AS status FROM LESSON l JOIN TRAINER t ON l.trainer_id = t.id JOIN `USER` tu ON t.user_id = tu.id JOIN MEMBER mb ON l.client_id = mb.id JOIN `USER` mu ON mb.user_id = mu.id LEFT JOIN MEMBERSHIP_PT mp ON mp.member_id = mb.id AND mp.trainer_id = t.id AND mp.gym_id = #{gymId} LEFT JOIN MEMBERSHIP m ON mp.membership_id = m.id AND m.type = 'pt' WHERE t.gym_id = #{gymId} AND l.lesson_date = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY l.start_time
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(payment_price), 0) FROM PAYMENT WHERE gym_id = #{gymId} AND status = '결제완료' AND payment_date >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01')
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(payment_price), 0) FROM PAYMENT WHERE gym_id = #{gymId} AND payment_type = 'MEMBERSHIP' AND status = '결제완료' AND payment_date >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01')
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(payment_price), 0) FROM PAYMENT WHERE gym_id = #{gymId} AND payment_type = 'PT' AND status = '결제완료' AND payment_date >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01')

SELECT t.id AS trainerId, u.name AS trainerName, IFNULL(ls.sessionCount, 0) AS sessionCount, IFNULL(p.revenue, 0) AS revenue FROM TRAINER t JOIN `USER` u ON t.user_id = u.id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT trainer_id, COUNT(*) AS sessionCount FROM LESSON WHERE status = '완료' GROUP BY trainer_id ) ls ON ls.trainer_id = t.id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT trainer_id, SUM(payment_price) AS revenue FROM PAYMENT WHERE payment_type = 'PT' AND status = '결제완료' AND payment_date >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01') GROUP BY trainer_id ) p ON p.trainer_id = t.id
WHERE t.gym_id = #{gymId} ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT CASE DAYOFWEEK(`date`) WHEN 1 THEN 'SUN' WHEN 2 THEN 'MON' WHEN 3 THEN 'TUE' WHEN 4 THEN 'WED' WHEN 5 THEN 'THU' WHEN 6 THEN 'FRI' WHEN 7 THEN 'SAT' END AS dayName,
COUNT(*) AS visitCount,
ROUND(COUNT(*) / IFNULL(maxTable.maxCount, 1) * 100) AS heightPercent,
DATE_FORMAT(`date`, '%m-%d') AS dateLabel
FROM WORKOUT_LOG, ( SELECT MAX(cnt) AS maxCount FROM ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM WORKOUT_LOG WHERE gym_id = #{gymId} AND `date` BETWEEN #{weekStart} AND #{weekEnd} GROUP BY DAYOFWEEK(`date`) ) t ) maxTable WHERE gym_id = #{gymId} AND `date` BETWEEN #{weekStart} AND #{weekEnd} GROUP BY DAYOFWEEK(`date`), maxTable.maxCount ORDER BY DAYOFWEEK(`date`)

SELECT CASE WHEN prev.cnt = 0 AND curr.cnt > 0 THEN 100 WHEN prev.cnt = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((curr.cnt - prev.cnt) / prev.cnt * 100, 1) END FROM ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.id) AS cnt FROM MEMBER m JOIN `USER` u ON m.user_id = u.id JOIN MEMBERSHIP_PT mp ON mp.member_id = m.id WHERE mp.gym_id = #{gymId} AND u.created_at >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01') ) curr, ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.id) AS cnt FROM MEMBER m JOIN `USER` u ON m.user_id = u.id JOIN MEMBERSHIP_PT mp ON mp.member_id = m.id WHERE mp.gym_id = #{gymId} AND u.created_at >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01') AND u.created_at < DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01') ) prev

SELECT CASE WHEN prev.amount = 0 AND curr.amount > 0 THEN 100 WHEN prev.amount = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((curr.amount - prev.amount) / prev.amount * 100, 1) END FROM ( SELECT IFNULL(SUM(payment_price), 0) AS amount FROM PAYMENT WHERE gym_id = #{gymId} AND status = '결제완료' AND payment_date >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01') ) curr, ( SELECT IFNULL(SUM(payment_price), 0) AS amount FROM PAYMENT WHERE gym_id = #{gymId} AND status = '결제완료' AND payment_date >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01') AND payment_date < DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01') ) prev

SELECT CASE WHEN prev.amount = 0 AND curr.amount > 0 THEN 100 WHEN prev.amount = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((curr.amount - prev.amount) / prev.amount * 100, 1) END FROM ( SELECT IFNULL(SUM(payment_price), 0) AS amount FROM PAYMENT WHERE gym_id = #{gymId} AND payment_type = 'MEMBERSHIP' AND status = '결제완료' AND payment_date >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01') ) curr, ( SELECT IFNULL(SUM(payment_price), 0) AS amount FROM PAYMENT WHERE gym_id = #{gymId} AND payment_type = 'MEMBERSHIP' AND status = '결제완료' AND payment_date >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01') AND payment_date < DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01') ) prev

SELECT CASE WHEN prev.amount = 0 AND curr.amount > 0 THEN 100 WHEN prev.amount = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((curr.amount - prev.amount) / prev.amount * 100, 1) END FROM ( SELECT IFNULL(SUM(payment_price), 0) AS amount FROM PAYMENT WHERE gym_id = #{gymId} AND payment_type = 'PT' AND status = '결제완료' AND payment_date >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01') ) curr, ( SELECT IFNULL(SUM(payment_price), 0) AS amount FROM PAYMENT WHERE gym_id = #{gymId} AND payment_type = 'PT' AND status = '결제완료' AND payment_date >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01') AND payment_date < DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01') ) prev

SELECT m.type_rep AS month, IFNULL(ROUND(COUNT(*) / NULLIF(total.totalCount, 0) * 100), 0) AS percent FROM MEMBERSHIP_PT mp JOIN MEMBERSHIP m ON mp.membership_id = m.id CROSS JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCount FROM MEMBERSHIP_PT mp2 JOIN MEMBERSHIP m2 ON mp2.membership_id = m2.id WHERE mp2.gym_id = #{gymId} AND m2.type = 'month' AND mp2.register_date >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01') ) total WHERE mp.gym_id = #{gymId} AND m.type = 'month' AND mp.register_date >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01') GROUP BY m.type_rep, total.totalCount ORDER BY m.type_rep

SELECT MONTH(monthly.monthDate) AS month, IFNULL(ROUND(monthly.totalRevenue / NULLIF(maxTable.maxRevenue, 0) * 100), 0) AS totalPercent, CASE WHEN monthly.totalRevenue = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(monthly.membershipRevenue / monthly.totalRevenue * 100) END AS membershipPercent FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(payment_date, '%Y-%m-01') AS monthDate, IFNULL(SUM(payment_price), 0) AS totalRevenue, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN payment_type = 'MEMBERSHIP' THEN payment_price ELSE 0 END), 0) AS membershipRevenue FROM PAYMENT WHERE gym_id = #{gymId} AND status = '결제완료' AND payment_date >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 5 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01') GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(payment_date, '%Y-%m-01') ) monthly CROSS JOIN ( SELECT MAX(totalRevenue) AS maxRevenue FROM ( SELECT IFNULL(SUM(payment_price), 0) AS totalRevenue FROM PAYMENT WHERE gym_id = #{gymId} AND status = '결제완료' AND payment_date >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 5 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01') GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(payment_date, '%Y-%m-01') ) t ) maxTable ORDER BY monthly.monthDate

SELECT CASE DAYOFWEEK(`date`) WHEN 1 THEN 'SUN' WHEN 2 THEN 'MON' WHEN 3 THEN 'TUE' WHEN 4 THEN 'WED' WHEN 5 THEN 'THU' WHEN 6 THEN 'FRI' WHEN 7 THEN 'SAT' END AS dayName, HOUR(start_time) AS hour, COUNT(*) AS visitCount, IFNULL(ROUND(COUNT(*) / NULLIF(maxTable.maxCount, 0) * 100), 0) AS heightPercent FROM WORKOUT_LOG, ( SELECT MAX(cnt) AS maxCount FROM ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM WORKOUT_LOG WHERE gym_id = #{gymId} AND `date` = #{selectedDate} GROUP BY HOUR(start_time) ) t ) maxTable WHERE gym_id = #{gymId} AND `date` = #{selectedDate} GROUP BY DAYOFWEEK(`date`), HOUR(start_time), maxTable.maxCount ORDER BY HOUR(start_time)
